title: ANALYZE on empty tables prevents the use of indices
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, name VARCHAR(255), value DECIMAL(10, 2), created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Sample A', 10.5);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Sample B', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: ANALYZE on empty tables prevents index usage
